from typing import Tuple


def get_user_profile(user_id: int) -> Tuple[str, str, int, bool]:
    user = fetch_user(user_id)
    return user.name, user.email, user.age, user.is_active


def process_order(order_id: int):
    name, email, age, active = get_user_profile(order_id)
    if not active:
        return
    send_email(email, name)


def fetch_metrics() -> Tuple[float, float, float, float, float]:
    return 0.95, 120.5, 45.2, 300, 0.02


def analyze_performance():
    p50, p95, p99, throughput, error_rate = fetch_metrics()
    if error_rate > 0.01:
        alert(f"High error rate: {error_rate}")
    report_latency(p50, p95, p99)
